habitat: Sudanian savanna belt of West Africa.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional skin emollient and cooking fat; women’s cooperative economy plant.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelles Hautpflege- und Kochfett; Wirtschaftspflanze von Frauenkooperativen.
activeCompounds: Stearic and oleic triglycerides, unsaponifiables (karitene, etc.)
cautions: Topical allergies rare but possible. Food use regional.
historicalNotes: Vital non-timber forest product of the Sahel–savanna.
